leadText: Ice Spinner (Japanese: アイススピナー Ice Spinner) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is TM124 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Ice Spinner inflicts damage and removes any terrain present on the battlefield. However, if the user faints due to its held Life Orb , the target's held Rocky Helmet , or the target having the Ability Rough Skin or Iron Barbs , or the user is forced to switch out due to the target's Red Card , the terrain is not removed.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.
